settings.editor:
Product Description

Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted Anarkali suit set. The gown boasts a dramatic flare and premium inner lining for maximum comfort during long events. Complete with a matching pant and an embroidered shawl-style dupatta, this outfit is designed to make a statement at weddings and festive gatherings.

Top (Choli)

Fabric & Lining: Made from heavy pure crunchy silk fabric paired with a soft micro cotton inner lining.

Work & Details: Beautifully adorned with elegant embroidery sequence work layouts across the blouse.

Fit & Sizing: Comes fully stitched and is available in sizes XS to XXL.

Bottom (Lehenga)

Fabric & Lining: Crafted from heavy pure crunchy silk material and finished with a comfortable micro cotton inner lining.

Work & Volume: Features matching embroidery sequence work details along with a beautiful 3.50-meter flair.

Size: Free size fully stitched with 38-40 inch approx length.

Dupatta

Fabric & Size: Crafted from pure crunchy silk fabric with a total length measurement of 2.30 meters.

Artwork: Detailed with rich, heavy embroidery sequence work patterns running throughout.

Wash Instructions

First Wash: Dry clean recommended to maintain the fabric texture and sequence work.

Subsequent Washes: Gentle hand wash separately in cold water using a mild liquid detergent.

Care Advice: Do not wring or twist. Dry in shade away from direct sunlight to prevent color fading. Iron on low heat on the reverse side only.
